---
title: "test_corvus_process_empire.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_corvus_process_empire.ts"
loc: 87
complexity: 6
logic_score: 3.77
style_score: 4.06
intel_score: 3.70
overall_score: 3.97
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.1/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 13 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [describe](file://node:test)
- [it](file://node:test)
- [beforeEach](file://node:test)
- [afterEach](file://node:test)
- [*](file://node:assert)
- [CorvusProcess](file://../../src/node/core/CorvusProcess.js)
- [spawn](file://child_process)
- [EventEmitter](file://events)
- [PassThrough](file://stream)

### Exports
- `cp`
- `stdout`
- `stderr`
- `mockChild`
- `stdout`
- `stderr`
- `mockChild`
- `stdout`
- `stderr`
- `mockChild`
